items.name_cn:
MCM Aren ESSENTIAL
Mini#Boston Pillow Bag
Top Version 💰 Exclusive® Classic Cognac
Can be shoulder, crossbody, or hand-held. Official website synchronized model.
This mini Boston bag offers a fresh interpretation of the classic style, crafted from classic Visetos material, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel. Its silhouette evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. The exquisite craftsmanship features a hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted top handle.
Model: MWBAASE03CO001
Size: 18*8*9.5cm
Strap: 102-118cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_cn:
MCM Aren Visetos
New mini patchwork basket 👜
Exclusive® Classic Cognac
This mini Aren top-zip shopper is the latest design for Spring/Summer 2024, featuring eye-catching Spanish calfskin trim outlining the upper part of the bag. This small daily bag is lined with soft eco-friendly cotton, offering ample space for small essentials and valuables. A soft leather handle provides a comfortable hand-carry experience, while the included leather crossbody strap allows for an elegant hands-free function.
Model: MWPDSTA01CO001
Size: 21.5*9.5*19cm
Strap: 100-116cm
Handle: Drop 11cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Small Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
This is a two-in-one iconic piece. The petite Liz bag features a double-sided Cubic cotton canvas design, showcasing the brand's multidimensional character. Inside the shopping bag hides a detachable zippered clutch that can be used separately as a classic shoulder bag.
Size: 29*14*25cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Cognac / Brown 🁢

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Medium Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Two classic looks are fused into one daily essential. This medium-sized Liz shopping bag is made of Visetos and Nappa leather, and can be used on both sides, with the turned-out lining revealing the Cubic classic pattern. Additionally, the lightweight silhouette can be expanded or contracted via a leather drawstring. The included detachable zippered clutch enriches the functionality of this shopping bag and can be removed to serve as a wallet for short trips.
Size: 36*17*28cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Cognac / Brown 🁢

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Beige Small Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Upgraded Off-White
This small shopping bag is made of classic Visetos, continuing the Liz bag's traditional elegance in daily life. The other side of the bag is made of Cubic classic print, adding another layer of design depth. The lightweight silhouette can be adjusted via a leather drawstring on the side to adapt to the dynamic changes of modern life. The detachable zippered clutch can serve as a classic shoulder bag for short trips and night outs, becoming the highlight of this bag's design.

Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Beige / Beige 🖱️

items.name_cn:
【Top Original Factory】
MCM Ella Visetos🆕New Arrival
Cognac #Small Shopping Bag
Zip-top bag adds a small size❗
·Cp Exclusive®️Cognac Visetos Full Print
This small Toni shopping bag is crafted from the iconic combination of classic Visetos and Nappa leather. It features an MCM logo plate, external back pocket, zip closure, internal pocket, and zip compartment.
Combining exquisite aesthetics with powerful practicality. The soft fabric lining offers ample internal space for storing tablets and accessories, while the top zip closure ensures the safety of your belongings. The external back pocket allows for quick access to your smartphone and other essential items.
Style: G10
Size: 26*11*25cm
Zip: Top zip closure
Handle Drop: 24cm
Color: Cognac
